title: Why Water Resists Temperature Change
script_summary: Explore how water's unique properties help regulate temperature in our environment and bodies.

segments.voiceover: Water absorbs heat without a big temperature jump.
Ever wondered why lakes don’t freeze instantly or why your body stays warm? It’s all about water's high specific heat.
This means water can absorb a lot of heat before changing temperature, stabilizing climates and our bodies.
For instance, oceans regulate weather patterns. They absorb heat from the sun, releasing it slowly, keeping temperatures moderate.
And in your body, it cools you down through perspiration, maintaining a stable temperature for life.
Stay curious! Like and subscribe for more science secrets.
